stylePrompt: Create a completely original Grandpa Chic lighting product that combines warmth, memory, and collected character with a sharp contemporary edit. Draw from fringed shades, dark walnut, library lamps, plaid textiles, aged brass, and velvet, then simplify the composition and introduce one modern material or precision detail. The lamp should feel storied, comforting, intelligent, and fashion-aware rather than dusty, kitschy, or nostalgically copied.
specificElements: A restrained fringe beneath a clean shade
A walnut stem joined to a precise metal base
A plaid texture abstracted into a perforation grid
An aged-brass reading arm with modern optics
A velvet-toned shade paired with a polished steel detail
A familiar library silhouette with unexpected proportions
metalTranslationPrompt: Use warm aged brass, dark bronze, traditional turned-metal details, restrained pleated-metal shade references, familiar hardware proportions, and one clean contemporary metal accent.
